headline: Why Schools and Universities Need Separate Reporting Addresses
subtext: Universities rarely have just one kind of sensitive report to receive. A student safety concern, a Title IX-style complaint, and a financial misconduct report do not belong to the same office, do not carry the same expectations, and usually should not start w…
